positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a small forest scene featuring a sleepy fox, a cluster of glowing mushrooms, and a tiny, meandering river. The mood should be magical and gentle, utilizing pastel blues, moss greens, and soft lavender accents. Storybook illustration style, soft edges, ethereal lighting, highly detailed watercolor wash.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, neon, cyberpunk, harsh contrast
